arts.ttl: 'He's starting to do some stuff on the pitch': Mikel Arteta shares 'great news' on Arsenal injury front pre-Brighton
arts.sum: Arsenal are doing well this season as they remain firmly in the Premier League title picture and are also doing well in the Champions League...

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury latest as five miss Brighton with Kai Havertz confirmation and triple update
arts.sum: The forward injured his knee prior to the win over Palace and has missed the previous two games. The good news continues to flow at Sobha Realty with Raheem Sterling progressing in his return from injury.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe sends brutal Paul Merson Arsenal message and makes Alexander Isak transfer claim
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has firmly dismissed any suggestion that Newcastle United might consider selling key players like Alexander Isak, particularly in response to comments from Arsenal legend Paul Merson. Earlier in the campaign, Eddie Howe had voiced that rival Premier League clubs were unwilling to help Newcastle United out in the transfer market.

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker tells it how it is with Bukayo Saka injury in huge blow for Arsenal
arts.sum: "Yeah, I still think they'll finish second, which is what I actually predicted [at the start of the season]," said the ex-Tottenham star. Bukayo Saka's injury may just end Arsenal's Premier League title aspirations, according to Gary Lineker and Micah Richards.

arts.ttl: I was sold by Arsenal for being 'too fat' - now I could haunt them in title race
arts.sum: Despite his two-year stint in the Gunners' academy and leaving for PSV in August 2017 for around £540,000, Malen's departure came after a rather surprising critique from Andries Jonker, Arsenal’s then head of youth development. Aston Villa have reportedly set their sights on Borussia Dortmund's Donyell Malen, having seen an offer for the forward turned down already this month.

arts.ttl: 'Something is missing' - Mikel Arteta makes brutally honest Arsenal Premier League title admission - football.london
arts.sum: When asked if the experience of being in a two-horse race the last two seasons gave him encouragement in chasing down Liverpool, Arteta said: "All we have to do is show the same level of consistency and a bit more, because the last year we have been the best team in the league, broken various records and still haven’t won a major trophy, so something is missing. Arsenal have finished as runners-up in the Premier League in each of the last two seasons to Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed clear Alexander Isak transfer message by Newcastle boss Eddie Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says he is unmoved by speculation linking Arsenal with star striker Alexander Isak. The Gunners have been tipped to search for a new centre-forward in 2025 and Isak has been persistently connected with a potential move south.

arts.ttl: Is Kai Havertz fit to start for Brighton vs Arsenal? Injury news latest and FPL update
arts.sum: and Fantasy Premier League players - will be hoping that Kai Havertz will be fit enough to return to the squad to face Brighton on Saturday evening. An illness bug has struck the Arsenal squad in recent days which has affected several players, including Havertz, and Mikel Arteta was asked about the current state of his squad during his pre-match press conference.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star in stunning transfer exit talks as Mikel Arteta issues fresh January update
arts.sum: "Kieran Tierney has not asked me to leave," he admitted in a press conference. Even though Arteta was reluctant to suggest he would be doing anything other than staying, Tierney could even depart this month.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal battling Wolves and Crystal Palace in bid to sign Champions League defender
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs are looking to strengthen their squads this summer and it looks like Arsenal, Wolves and Crystal Palace are all...
